title: WeConnect - The video conferencing app with a real-time translating
description: WeConnect is a video conferencing app that my team and I built with a real-time translation feature to help people overcome language barriers during online meetings. We designed it with international students in mind—especially those who work with classmates who speak different languages.
myRoleDescription: As a Full-Stack Web Developer, I was responsible for architecting and implementing core features of the WeConnect application.
realtimeTranslationDesc: Integrated live speech-to-text and translation services, allowing multilingual participants to communicate seamlessly during video calls.
videoChatInfrastructureDesc: Built a secure and scalable WebRTC-based video chat system that supports group and one-on-one conversations.
userInterfaceUXDesc: Designed an intuitive frontend for joining meetings, selecting languages, and viewing live translated subtitles, enhancing accessibility and ease of use.
authenticationRoomManagementDesc: Implemented user login, room creation, and participant tracking to ensure smooth meeting workflows and secure access control.
